name: common-dev
description: OpenSpec 工作流门禁与通用安全钩子，兼容 Codex 和 Claude Code。

interface.longDescription: 为 Codex 与 Claude Code 提供 OpenSpec 变更门禁、API Key 检测和会话引导钩子。
defaultPrompt: Block code changes until OpenSpec tasks.md is ready.
Detect hard-coded API keys before file writes and git commits.
Guide coding requests into the OpenSpec workflow.
